reviews.review_description:
Tons of fun, while it works. Got a huge high score? Don't count on it going in the leaderboard. I currently hold 2nd place despite having a score nearly 3 times that of first place. Neck is killing me from all that work. I have a screenshot of my final score, the game froze at the end, and here's why:

After the final boss is killed, you get a limited opportunity to continue working on your high score. No matter how good you are, no matter how efficient or accurate you are, eventually you'll run out of time. It would help if the trigger didn't freeze up sometimes,  but that was just a small nuisance. After running through it more times than I can count in a single game, i started getting closer and closer to that timer running out. And when i approached the boss, headshot the enemies with the burst fire, tossed a ball through the portal with the clock counting down, 3, 2, 1... and then as it hit zero, i crossed through and earned extra time. But there was a glitch. I couldn't see the endgame screen, but i couldn't fire anymore. I ran out of time, but I didn't. So the game was stuck, and my high score of over 1.9 million points was lost.

Hopefully this gets fixed, I can do better than 2 million and earn my place at the top all over again, but this does need to be fixed. Thanks for the fun game

Haha, this is even better and lovely. I bought it after playing "Viral". I actually liked viral more than this in term of enjoyment but i liked this new viral version due to being more challenging and fast.

As always, music used in both viral games are so lovely that I play while dance a bit myself :)

Go buy this and you won't regret. One of best game in Gear VR.

(S7 + Gear VR 2016 + Ipega Controller)

Viral is one of the best addictive games on Gear VR and I am so happy to have a new game in the series.  I don't have the new VR controller yet so I am still limited to just the TouchPad.  My only complaint is that there are audio issues, every 30 seconds to a minute the audio slows and distorts.  I am on a Galaxy S6.  Will update stars once that is fixed.

UPDATE:  Thank you!  Restarted phone and sound is now fine.  Now to get used to the new levels and challenges!

developer_response.body: Hi. Sorry to hear about your audio problem, this is certainly a new one for us. Could you please restart your phone and see if the problem still occurs? If so, any chance you could email support@fiercekaiju.com and let us know which version of Android you are running (available through settings>about device>software info) and as much information about your system as possible, and we'll do our best to track it down and find a fix. Thanks, the FK team.

reviews.review_description:
This game is very well made with tons of solid content and very fun gameplay. It is somewhat reminiscent of portal but still very much it's own game.

I was blown away by their use of the controller as you will be nailing targets and blasting enemies near and far with pinpoint accuracy.

The ragdoll effects and general physics in the game are awesome. I would say this is a must have if you own the controller! Even without it, the game is tons of fun.

Great Job :)

Getting choppy audio, unplayable. S7Edge with bloatware removed, background apps etc closed prior to start. Trying a re install as restart never worked for me. Would love to rate 5 stars if I get to play, as I like these type of games, and it looks great. Planning an update for this problem?Thanks

reviews.review_title: So much fun and addictive. Love it.
reviews.review_description: Finally the wait is over. Really love the first Viral and the sequel is super fun with challenging gameplay and new weapons. Thank you.

Hey this game is really good and a lot of fun but It's pretty hard to make it through some of the levels with limited ammo? I found myself stuck on one of the levels and keep running out of ammo. Would really like an unlimited ammo mode. That way you can just score on accuracy instead of not being able to finish the game.
Not bad especially with Controller but too difficult and frustrating for my opinion... Why no difficulty levels?
Absolutely loved the design of this game. The exciting gameplay combined with the humor and charm made the experience 10/10. Will definitely be recommending this one to others!

The game loads and there are 5 doors and some balls floating around. I can't figure out what to do. None of the buttons on my remote or headset seem to do anything in the game.

-UPDATE-
For some reason the first time I entered the game I did not get a option for the tutorial and none of the doors were available as in none were green or red. I logged back in the next day and it works. I also rebooted my phone so my phone was most likely the issue.

Great customer service. I got a response to an email in under an hour.

Awesome graphics and game play so far.

developer_response.body: Hi. Sorry to hear about your problems. To enter into the game levels, simply look at a door which is illuminated in green (red = locked) until it opens and tap the touchpad or the usual main interaction button on your remote/controller/gamepad. If the controls are indeed all unresponsive, it sounds like a technical issue that's likely local to your system - could you try restarting your phone first, also maybe try reseating the phone into your GearVR and jiggle it about a bit. If you still have problems, reach out to support@fiercekaiju.com and we'll see what we can do to help. Either way when you start to enjoy the game, we'd be grateful if you'd return to update your review. Thanks!
